2025-26 Houston Rockets Roster and Stats

Previous Season

Record: 52-30, Finished 5th in NBA Western Conference

Coach: Ime Udoka (52-30)

Executive: Rafael Stone

PTS/G: 115.2 (18th of 30) Opp PTS/G: 110.0 (4th of 30)

SRS: 4.87 (7th of 30) Pace: 96.1 (29th of 30)

Off Rtg: 118.6 (8th of 30) Def Rtg: 113.2 (6th of 30) Net Rtg: +5.4 (6th of 30)

Expected W-L: 54-28 (6th of 30)

Preseason Odds: Championship +1400, Over-Under 52.5

Arena: Toyota Center Attendance: 740,378 (18th of 30)

NBA 2026 Playoffs:
Lost NBA Western Conference First Round (2-4) versus Los Angeles Lakers  (Series Stats)

Box Plus/Minus

Box Plus/Minus
A box score estimate of the points per 100 possessions a player contributed above a league-average player, translated to an average team.

Value Over Replacement Player

Value over Replacement Player
A box score estimate of the points per 100 TEAM possessions that a player contributed above a replacement-level (-2.0) player, translated to an average team and prorated to an 82-game season.

Multiply by 2.70 to convert to wins over replacement.

Kevin Durant 4.7 (7th)
Alperen Şengün 3.7 (13th)

Offensive Rebound Pct

Offensive Rebound Percentage
An estimate of the percentage of available offensive rebounds a player grabbed while they were on the floor.

Steal Pct

Steal Percentage
An estimate of the percentage of opponent possessions that end with a steal by the player while they were on the floor.

Reed Sheppard 2.8 (8th)
Tari Eason 2.3 (14th)

Triple-Doubles

Triple-Doubles The NBA did not track Triple-Doubles until 1979-80 when Magic Johnson popularized the feat. Nonetheless, we can present Triple-Doubles since 1950-51 when rebounds became an official statistic. A small number may yet be unaccounted for but we're confident in the completeness of the list.

Alperen Şengün 4 (7th)
